== Notes for [[Item:Q88513|Q88513]] ==

* Livius.org: [http://www.livius.org/articles/person/gobryas-1-general/ Gobryas Gobryas (general)].
* Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gobryas_(general) Gobryas (Cyrus the Great's general)].

Was a general in the army of . Had a major part in the capture of the Babylonian Empire ([https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fall_of_Babylon Fall of Babylon]), by the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Achaemenid_Empire Achaemenid Empire].

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01207.htm#0

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
